title: U17+ Game Model
summary: A U.S. Soccer-aligned U17+ coaching framework built around the four moments of play: Attacking, Defending, Attacking to Defending Transition, and Defending to Attacking Transition.

phases.label: Attacking
phases.description: When in possession, advance the ball quickly in the attacking half with high energy and high tempo.

definitions.title: Game Idea
definitions.definition: When in possession, we want to dominate by advancing the ball quickly in the attacking half with high energy and high tempo.

principles.title: Provide options to play forward
principles.description: Provide vertical or diagonal passing options and create overloads in the middle.

principles.title: Break lines to advance attack
principles.description: Move or lose opponent when marked and make runs behind the defensive line.

principles.title: Finish the attack as fast as possible
principles.description: Take countermeasures, anticipate the opponent's counter, and finish the attack with purpose.

player_actions.title: Drive with the ball to exploit space
player_actions.description: Drive with the ball to exploit space.

player_actions.title: Engage the opponent to create a 1v1 or 2v1
player_actions.description: Engage the opponent and create a favorable attacking situation.

player_actions.title: Find a free player between or behind the lines
player_actions.description: Find a free player between or behind the lines to create the next action.

player_actions.title: Cross into space or to a player
player_actions.description: Cross into space or to a player to create a finish.

phases.label: Defending
phases.description: Defend compactly, force play wide, and recover as a unit.

definitions.title: Game Idea
definitions.definition: When out of possession, the team protects the goal and delays the opponent's progress by creating a compact and organized defensive shape.

principles.title: Create defending shape
principles.description: Create a compact defensive line and keep the team connected.

principles.title: Build pressure on the ball
principles.description: Press with intent, protect the middle, and recover quickly when the pressure is broken.

principles.title: Recover when pressure is broken
principles.description: Recover with speed and restore the defensive structure.

principles.title: Take countermeasures: anticipate to counter
principles.description: Protect against the opponent's counterattack and regain balance.

player_actions.title: Press the ball carrier
player_actions.description: Press the ball carrier immediately and make the play predictable.

player_actions.title: Cover the nearest supporting player
player_actions.description: Cover the nearest supporting player to maintain balance.

player_actions.title: Balance and protect the middle
player_actions.description: Balance and protect the middle to deny through balls.

phases.label: Attacking to Defending Transition
phases.description: As soon as possession is lost, recover balance and apply pressure quickly.

definitions.title: Game Idea
definitions.definition: After losing possession, the team must immediately recover shape, protect the central space, and delay the opponent's counterattack.

principles.title: Apply immediate pressure on the ball
principles.description: Press immediately and make the opponent play under pressure.

principles.title: Delay the counterattack
principles.description: Delay the opponent's counterattack by slowing the first pass and protecting the central lane.

principles.title: Recover with speed
principles.description: Recover shape with speed and get the team organized quickly.

principles.title: Deny finish from counterattack
principles.description: Deny the finish from the counterattack with compactness and coordination.

player_actions.title: Press the closest opponent immediately
player_actions.description: Press the closest opponent immediately to delay the transition.

player_actions.title: Recover into defensive shape
player_actions.description: Recover into defensive shape and protect the middle.

player_actions.title: Protect the width of the goal
player_actions.description: Protect the width of the goal and deny central penetration.

phases.label: Defending to Attacking Transition
phases.description: As soon as possession is won, attack quickly and create the next action.

definitions.title: Game Idea
definitions.definition: When the team regains possession, it should attack quickly with numbers and create the next action before the opponent can recover.

principles.title: Take countermeasures: anticipate the counter
principles.description: Anticipate the opponent's counter and protect the break.

principles.title: Finish the counterattack as fast as possible
principles.description: Attack with speed and create the next action before the structure is reset.

principles.title: Position to protect against counterattack
principles.description: Position the team to protect against counterattack while still attacking.

player_actions.title: Play the first pass forward
player_actions.description: Play the first pass forward and attack the space behind the defensive line.

player_actions.title: Support the break with speed
player_actions.description: Support the break with speed and create a numerical advantage.

player_actions.title: Finish the counterattack with purpose
player_actions.description: Finish the counterattack with purpose and create a chance.
